title: Manual Google Ads Audit Patterns
description: Schema for manual Google Ads audit patterns used as source material for future automated checks. The schema accepts the current extracted-audit format and the standardized future pattern format.

standard_pattern.description: Preferred standardized structure for newly extracted manual audit patterns.

pattern_id.description: Stable unique identifier for the manual audit pattern.

audit_area.description: Primary Google Ads audit area covered by this pattern.

issue_name.description: Short issue name suitable for an audit finding title.

how_to_detect.description: Plain-English detection guidance, including what an auditor looks for manually or what automation should evaluate.

data_required.description: Reports, segments, Google Ads API fields, or external data needed to detect the pattern.

severity_default.description: Default severity before account-specific context is applied.

why_it_matters.description: Business or optimization risk created by the issue.

recommendation.description: Recommended action an auditor would give the client.

example_client_language.description: Example client-facing explanation in the style of a manual audit.

implementation_status.description: Current automation lifecycle status for this pattern.

related_check_ids.description: Existing or proposed automated check IDs related to this pattern.

source_audit.description: Optional source audit, client-safe document name, or internal reference.

source_excerpt.description: Optional short excerpt from the manual audit that motivated this pattern.

notes.description: Additional context, caveats, false-positive risks, or reviewer notes.

implementation_notes.description: Notes for engineering or analytics implementation.

suggested_api_fields.description: Candidate Google Ads API fields needed for automated detection.

suggested_detection_logic.description: Proposed rule, threshold, heuristic, or algorithm for automated detection.

dependencies.description: Other modules, configuration values, data sources, or checks this pattern depends on.

current_extracted_pattern.description: Current structure used by audit_framework/manual_audit_patterns.json. Keep supported so existing extracted patterns validate while future entries migrate to standard_pattern.

id.description: Stable identifier used by the current extracted pattern file.

channel.description: Advertising channel this manual audit pattern applies to.

category.description: Legacy category label from the extracted manual audit pattern.

symptom.description: Observed symptom in the account or report.

evidence_cue.description: Manual report view, comparison, or cue that supports detection.

root_cause.description: Likely explanation or diagnostic hypothesis from the manual audit.

severity.description: Legacy default severity for the extracted pattern.

impact_area.description: Business metric or optimization area affected by the pattern.

benchmark.description: Manual threshold, heuristic, or benchmark used to decide when the pattern matters.
